title: lastrea brachyodus
intro: Lastrea brachyodus, also known as the Brachyodus fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae, native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lastrea brachyodus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
